zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Walgrave於1484年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親William Waldegrave22歲，母親Margery Wentworth31歲。她於1515年3月與John St. John在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾布勒左享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Walgrave于1484年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，她的父亲William Waldegrave22岁，母亲Margery Wentworth31岁。她于1515年3月与John St. John在英国英格兰素福爾可布勒斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年在英国英格兰貝德福爾布勒左享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: Walgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Waldegrave
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Walgrave was born in 1484, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Waldegrave, was 22 and her mother, Margery Wentworth, was 31. She married John St. John in March 1515, in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1565, in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Walgrave est née en 1484, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Waldegrave, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery Wentworth, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John St. John en mars 1515, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1565, à Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Walgrave 1484 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Waldegrave 22 und ihre Mutter Margery Wentworth 31. Sie hat im März 1515 in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John St. John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1565 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bures, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Walgrave è nata il nel 1484 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Waldegrave, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margery Wentworth, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John St. John nel marzo 1515, nel Bures, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1565, nel Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Bures, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Walgraveが1484年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父William Waldegraveは22歳，母Margery Wentworthは31歳であった。1515年3月にイギリスイギリススフォルクブレスでJohn St. Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアブレトソで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Walgrave(이)가 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Waldegrave(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Wentworth(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1515년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스에서 John St. John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 블레츠에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Walgrave nasceu em 1484, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Waldegrave, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery Wentworth, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John St. John em março de 1515, em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1565, em Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Walgrave родилась в 1484 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Waldegrave было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Wentworth, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John St. John марта 1515 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1565 г. в местности блецо, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Walgrave nació en 1484, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Waldegrave, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery Wentworth, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John St. John en marzo de 1515, en Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1565, en Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Bures, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
